targets.rawSql: SELECT bc.id AS bot_id, u.username, bc.name AS bot_name, bc.strategy_type, bc.exchange_type, bc.is_enabled, bi.is_running, bi.error_message, bi.started_at, bi.stopped_at FROM bot_configs bc JOIN users u ON u.id = bc.user_id LEFT JOIN bot_instances bi ON bi.bot_config_id = bc.id ORDER BY bi.is_running DESC NULLS LAST, bc.id DESC

SELECT bc.id AS bot_id, u.username, bc.name AS bot_name, bi.error_message, bi.stopped_at FROM bot_instances bi JOIN bot_configs bc ON bc.id = bi.bot_config_id JOIN users u ON u.id = bc.user_id WHERE bi.error_message IS NOT NULL AND bi.error_message != '' ORDER BY bi.stopped_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

SELECT tr.id, u.username, bc.name AS bot_name, tr.symbol, tr.side, tr.status, tr.entry_price, tr.exit_price, tr.pnl, tr.pnl_percent, tr.exit_reason, tr.leverage, tr.demo_mode, tr.entry_time, tr.exit_time FROM trade_records tr JOIN users u ON u.id = tr.user_id LEFT JOIN bot_configs bc ON bc.id = tr.bot_config_id ORDER BY tr.entry_time DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.role, u.is_active, u.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT bc.id) AS bots, COUNT(DISTINCT tr.id) AS trades FROM users u LEFT JOIN bot_configs bc ON bc.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN trade_records tr ON tr.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_deleted = false GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
SELECT al.created_at, u.username, al.method, al.path, al.status_code, al.response_time_ms, al.client_ip FROM audit_logs al LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = al.user_id ORDER BY al.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT date_trunc('day', entry_time) AS time, COUNT(*) AS trades, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses FROM trade_records WHERE entry_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', exit_time) AS time, SUM(pnl) AS total_pnl, SUM(fees) AS total_fees FROM trade_records WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
